programme.title: Love Boat
programme.desc: Reverend Whitneys blind date faces scorn from parishioner Barbara Sharp Bert Wilder helps his wife Audrey deal with being blind Princess engineer Tonys vacation plans change so Julie and Gopher invite his family on a free cruise

programme.title: Daktari
programme.desc: Daktari

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: At the haunted house recently purchased by the Harts weird friends Fred and Amanda a dinner party turns into a deadly treasure hunt

programme.title: Cagney and Lecey
programme.desc: An abandoned baby sets Cagney and Lacey on the trail of a baby broker and though deaf Mary Beth considers adopting her Meanwhile Chris new playwright boyfriend doesnt like her being a detective

programme.title: Starsky 209
programme.desc: Starsky 209

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: When Eddie a chronically drunk friend of Doms spouts off about UFO-type lights hes been seeing near his desert trailer everyone writes him off as a crackpot until one night while taking Eddie home Dom spots them too He and String investigate and discover a military compound nearby headed by a renegade general who is planning a preemptive nuclear strike against the Soviet Union Unfortunately while escaping Dom is shot and its up to Eddie to ride shotgun aboard Airwolf with String even though he doesnt believe he can do what may be asked of him

programme.title: Friday the 13Th The Series
programme.desc: A girl finds a compact mirror that has the power to make others adore her and uses the cursed object to seek revenge against her sister

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: A jazz musician sets off Sonia and punches are thrown as Ronnie tries to manage the mayhem and Matt and Sonia wrestle to bring deluded actors back to reality

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: When Rusty leads Sonia and Ronnie on a wild goose chase Sonia loses her cool and puts her foot down with Lou

programme.title: The Hanging Tree
programme.desc: Joseph a doctor keeps dominating peoples lives He frees a robber Rune from getting hanged; and forces his charge on him too as compensation Things change when Elizabeth enters Josephs life

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: After teenager Adam is coerced into having a one-night-stand with Loni a girl he meets at a party he finds that shes looking for a more permanent relationship Meanwhile Adams friend Max is forced to abandon his planned summer trip and take a job in a pizza place working under his creepy tyrannical uncle

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A former potential surgeon sets out to wreak revenge on the brother whose cruel practical joke prevented him from realizing his dream

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: An unattractive and unlucky actor cant get a role because of his looks His agent and girlfriend leave him But he doesnt intend to give up - he wants the role of Hamlet

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Handsome ambitious greedy Jeff Boder and his wealthy older wife Jackie Winslows cynical stepdaughter Pamela become lovers and conspire to kill Jackie using cursed voodoo-like dolls

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Married sleazy advertising executive and music producer Bob Ames finds gorgeous seductive Cathie Marks hiding in his cabin in the woods during a rainstorm Is she a dream come true or something more sinister and dangerous

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric meets a good witch in the woods who offers to cure him She gives a love potion to a girl whos boyfriend dies after taking it The boys dad blaming her shows up with his buddies and burns her house down with her in it

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric working in a Mom-and-Pop diner has to save the day when a gang of bikers show up to terrorize Mom Pop and a pretty customer Soups on werewolf style

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick chases a psychopath who is burning people alive and tries to protect the targets of the killers rage -- a band of homeless living under the citys streets

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A dentist uses a cursed electric chair to seek revenge against those who wronged him

programme.title: Psycho II
programme.desc: As a child Kevin was kidnapped by Freddy Krueger before Freddy was killed by a mob of angry parents

programme.title: Mchale 406
programme.desc: Mchale 406

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer starts dating Sergeant Carters sister Carter is determined to break them up

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carter assigns Pyle to drive his precious car back from the airport but the car is stolen immediately Now Pyle has 24 hours to find it before Carter gets back and kills him

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The professors data indicates that the island is sinking but the men dont want to break the news to the women who have the men in the middle of a landscaping project The Professor ends up hurting his back helping with a rock garden

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways find two crates of silent film equipment in a sunken boat in the lagoon The Professor then comes up with the idea to make a film telling their story send it out on a raft and hope for rescue

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Fastidious actor Sterling Ames injures his back on the McCoys property and must remain on their sofa for several days much to the annoyance of cantankerous Grandpa

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa decides to turn the tables after a fast-talking shooting gallery proprietor hustles Little Luke out of 14 in proceeds from the sale of church social tickets

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: After every number two man at CONTROL is killed Hymie becomes number two

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS puts up a reward for anyone who can Get Smart!

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ goes undercover to infiltrate the auto ring that stole his rig while Sheriff Cordell detained him in jail on trumped-up charges Assisting BJ in his work is the attractive Tracy McBain a young idealistic and accident-prone peace officer

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Ed feels sick with a cold so he demands that Wilbur buy a bed for him so that he can get a good nights rest

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Ed pesters Wilbur to have a will drawn up after he reads of a cat inheriting a large sum from her deceased owner

programme.title: Hogans 316
programme.desc: Hogans 316

programme.title: Hogans 229
programme.desc: Hogans 229

programme.title: Mchale 305
programme.desc: Mchale 305

programme.title: WKRP 110
programme.desc: WKRP 110

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Wood throws his back out the night before hes set to bowl against an old rival

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: The Newtons try to throw the perfect birthday party for Will

programme.title: Vegas
programme.desc: Tanna investigates the mysterious disappearances of beautiful Las Vegas showgirls and discovers they have been abducted by a white slaver When he gets caught trying to rescue them Binzer and Roth try to rescue him

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Stanleys evening at a singles bar ends with a murder and its up to Jonathan and Jennifer to find out who set him up

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Larry Darryl and Darryl have their relationship turned upside down when Larry discovers he isnt the oldest brother

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Dick and Joannas new friends decide to open an inn right next door and it ends up being such a success it steals all the Stratfords business

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: MacGillis Holowachuk and Gunny volunteer to do some paper work on All Hallows Eve but General Craig drives them crazy Casey is running a fever so she has to stay home for Halloween and while sleeping she dreams everybody is a monster

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan is jealous of the Skipper when he saves Mary Ann from drowning But he may get his chance to be a hero yet when a headhunter takes the other castaways prisoner

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: In the second season opener the series develops a more supernaturalweird tone as Mitch and Griff investigate a sunken freighter where they fight for their lives against an unknown force and realize that the freighter might have been sunk by a New Guinea sea monster according to a woman they found floating in the ocean near sunken wreckage of her sailboat

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: When Matt and Froy repo a car from an anger management meeting Froy suffers the consequences of taking on a violent rage-aholic

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: A jazz musician sets off Sonia and punches are thrown as Ronnie tries to manage the mayhem and Matt and Sonia wrestle to bring deluded actors back to reality

programme.title: The Bronx Warriors
programme.desc: In a post-apocalyptic New York City a policeman infiltrates the Bronx which has become a battleground for several murderous street gangs

programme.title: Godzilla Vs Mechagodzilla II
programme.desc: The United Nations assembles the ultimate weapon to defeat Godzilla while scientists discover a fresh pteranodon egg on a remote Japanese island

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: The Dukes assist young history professor Laura Bardsley search for a Civil War-era strongbox containing a valuable regimental payroll signed by President Lincoln Boss becomes aware of the boxs other contents - loads of money - and hires a pair of thugs to obtain it When Bardsley is kidnapped and forced to turn over the money to Boss she does so knowing the money was worthless Confederate currency!

programme.title: Hercules
programme.desc: Hercules

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Some who were detained during the Resistance sweep have not reappeared after their release Lili is taken to a lab run by Sandoval and implanted Renee tries to help Liam find the missing people

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: War of the Worlds

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Killer mist from the swamp attacks Houma putting residents in grave danger Arcane and Alec team up to to find an antidote while Abigail and Will hunt for a boy who may be lost in the mist Can they stop the mist before someone gets hurt

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Wills past comes back to haunt him not only in his dreams but here in his new home when a friend shows up who was involved in a robbery

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: As the Alphans are planning to explore the planet Ariel a missile attaches itself to the en route Eagle Upon returning to Alpha the missile gives the Alphans a lunar atmosphere But the joy at the possibility of making a new world out of the Moon is short lived as the moon does not enter orbit around the planet or its sun and Alpha faces destruction from the newly acquired lunar air

programme.title: Psycho II
programme.desc: As a child Kevin was kidnapped by Freddy Krueger before Freddy was killed by a mob of angry parents

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: A handsome stranger saves Audras life during a horse stampede and she quickly becomes attached to him unaware of his involvement in a series of robberies in the Valley

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: After Cheyenne takes a cattle herd to Mexico he is captured by the French After escaping he aids a young runaway princess who doesnt like her much older intended husband He takes her to a rebel camp where they learn her real identity

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Young Riders

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streetrs of San Francisco
programme.desc: A sniper is randomly shooting people in a high-rise building and threatens to continue doing it until he is paid a million dollars Stone and Keller try to identify and stop the assailant but Stone believes the methods of the acting captain in charge of the investigation are wrong for the situation

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Cinnamon does her job all too well when the latest mission requires her to feign love for a vain assassin Meanwhile Briggs and Barney work to get an over-the-hill terrorist out of the way

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon try to track down the driver who hit and run with a pedestrian

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The detectives break up a gambling ring Friday is undercover

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble works as lifeguard for a hotel casino owner whose wild sexy adult daughter makes unwanted advances toward him to get back at her father

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: The arrival of an old friend of Victoria and Toms causes trouble in the Valley due to the mans claim on a plot of land which has been earmarked as the location of a new dam

programme.title: The Coin short movie
programme.desc: The Coin short movie

programme.title: The Gladiator
programme.desc: A homicidal maniac is on the loose in Los Angeles killing motorists at random with his death car After losing his brother Jeff to the twisted assassin known as Skull Rick Benton takes it upon himself to hunt down the reckless drivers that fill the streets at night Being a master mechanic Rick spends his time converting his pick-up truck into an armed and dangerous vehicle With speed to take on the fastest car and strength to make sure in a one-on-one situation he will be the only survivor The cops soon find out about the vigilante known only as the Gladiator and do all they can to catch him before his citizens arrests go one step too far

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Retriever
programme.desc: A martial artist Max Thayer flees with an ex-agents manuscript and sister Shawn Hoskins while on a mission for the CIA

programme.title: Revenge of the Ninja
programme.desc: A Japanese gallery owner denies his violent ninja heritage until American drug traffickers kidnap his young son

programme.title: The Presidents Man
programme.desc: A US presidents highly classified secret agent must find a fearless replacement to take over his extremely dangerous military missions

programme.title: Black Eagle
programme.desc: A CIA free-lancer Shô Kosugi takes his children and a baby sitter Doran Clark to Malta where he meets his KGB match Jean-Claude Van Damme

programme.desc: Handsome ambitious greedy Jeff Boder and his wealthy older wife Jackie Winslows cynical stepdaughter Pamela become lovers and conspire to kill Jackie using cursed voodoo-like dolls

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Married sleazy advertising executive and music producer Bob Ames finds gorgeous seductive Cathie Marks hiding in his cabin in the woods during a rainstorm Is she a dream come true or something more sinister and dangerous

programme.title: Werewolf

programme.title: Psycho II
programme.desc: As a child Kevin was kidnapped by Freddy Krueger before Freddy was killed by a mob of angry parents

programme.title: Dawn of the Dead
programme.desc: During an escalating zombie epidemic two Philadelphia SWAT team members a traffic reporter and his TV executive girlfriend seek refuge in a secluded shopping mall

programme.title: The Midnight Hour
programme.desc: Phil Melissa Mitch Mary and Vinnie are high school friends who unwittingly raise the dead on Halloween night Once the dead have returned Pitchford Cove will never be the same againor will it

programme.title: Dark Night of the Scarecrow
programme.desc: In a small Southern town four vigilantes wrongfully execute a mentally-challenged man but after the court sets them free mysterious accidents begin to kill them off one by one

programme.title: The Return
programme.desc: In New Mexico an alien spacecraft abducts two young children and an old man 25 years later the children are returned as adults to the same town now beset by strange cattle mutilations

programme.title: Invitation to Hell
programme.desc: A family moves to a suburban town only to be coerced into joining a suspicious club

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Coaches in fight sport are at times an underrated but yet intergral part of an athlete's success. What makes them give up their day, weeks and years to help their fighters be the best in the world? This episode features Jaclyn Madarasz as we delve into the life of a coach.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Nick Agallar v. Nardu Debrah

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Alex Lohore v. Tommy Gunn

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in Hard Knocks' cage. Mykel Shipman v. Roberto Lopez.

programme.desc: The School of Hard Knocks 31 filmed at the Spectra Place in Estevan. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in the cage. programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

programme.title: The Tim Hayes Interview
programme.desc: Sherard sits down with the man who has turn comedy into an art

programme.title: The Chef Felicia Grady Cooking Special
programme.desc: World renown chef Ms Felicia Grady stops by the show to cook a delicious meal for the crew

programme.title: The Heart Hayes Interview
programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the beautiful actress Heart Hayes Hear how keeping her standards high is the only option Also in the episode I chat it up with former Supreme Susaye Green And Businessman Mr Johnboy Watts

programme.title: The Sherard Show on location at the Comedy Chateau
programme.desc: Join me live on location where I chop it up with comedy icon Mr Mike Marino As well as surprise guest Mr Sean Kanan and more!

programme.title: The Sherard Show Celebrates Sherards 50th Birthday
programme.desc: Join me as I celebrate a milestone in life as well as on the show Featuring special guests Felix Mcnulty Jennifer Santos and the beautiful Irina Voornina

programme.title: The Sam Kwasman Interview
programme.desc: Meet the man who is the original voice of Donald Duck-Mr Sam Kwasman Also the legendary Freda Payne returns to the show to speak about her recent Induction

programme.title: The Mel Carter Interview
programme.desc: The last of the great ones Mr Mel Carter returns to the show to speak about Sam Cooke Dean Martin and one person youll never believe he worked with

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget is sent to retrieve a group of Malaysian explorers who are now MADs prisoners

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Scooter and Turbo struggle to free Matt Nick and AJ from the pulsar generators spell

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The destabilized energy crystal has an unexpected effect on the struggle between good and evil on Gobotron

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Oton leads the Time Creatures from the future on a mission to eliminate the HerculoidsThe Viking-like Raider Apes led by Gotron raid a village looking for gold Zandor comes to the rescue

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Konar is siphoning the atmosphere Zandor follows the wind to find him who brings out the ZorbotsVolton and the Electrode Men fly their spaceship into a volcano where they aim to take over the world

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Jayce and Herc land the barge on a planet with incredibly huge plants Saw Boss is sending vines to grow there and Jayce must stop them But Jayce Gillian and Herc are captured by warrior crusaders Oon stumbles into the castle where they are being held and accidentally removes the shield from the stone making him the new leader Everyone joins together to rid the planet of monster minds The crusaders learn that not all intruders are enemies; some are friends

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Jayce is led to an abandoned ship by a signal from his father Jayce finds his father has left a message for him but he needs more power from the Pride to receive the coordinates of his fathers destination A self-destruct mechanism is activated and Jayce must work quickly to get the message while battling monster minds They get away with only seconds to spare

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM steals the famous Lippizaner Stallions earning 4 million in platinum bars from an Arab At the end VENOM loses the money by a laser shot from Shark and they all quickly flee in Piranha

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM is manipulating a tribe of aboriginals with holographic projections of flying rocks The aboriginals think its their god Mimi VENOM is after the secret treasure chamber of Mimi Scott and T-Bob get mixed up with the aboriginals when they think T-Bob is representing their Mimi god At the end Brad saves the day with his hocus pocus mask

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Rescue! The Jupiter Crew

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: A Lullaby Echoing in War

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Dr Wily creates an android that is a replica of Kevins worst enemy from high school

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain challenges the N-Team to an athletic competition on Mount Icarus thus distracting them from stopping her from finding the Three Sacred Treasures

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Hank Sheila Presto Eric and Diana are captured by Venger and thrown into a volcanic prison Its up to Bobby to save them with some help from one of Vengers unwilling servants

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: A cursed knight named Dekion tricks the kids into retrieving a Circle of Power for Venger The Circle can be used for good or evil and its up to Dekion to make that choice

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby suspects that MAD have stolen the national treasure of Ireland the Blarney Stone and sends Gadget to retrieve it
